title: Observable Event v1
description: A user-observable event: what appeared on the user's screen or in an API response, classified against the Knowledge Engine event taxonomy. Facts only; estimates live in report.estimates.

kind.description: Extensible-by-policy enum: 'unknown' is the mandated graceful-degradation member for anything undocumented.

surface.description: Where the user observed it. 'other' covers additional hosts; 'unspecified' when the user did not say.

verbatim.description: Exactly what the user saw, quoted. null when the user could not provide it.

documented_match.description: Id of the matching Knowledge Engine taxonomy entry; null when kind=unknown or none.

notes.description: Honest classification notes, e.g. what could not be concluded.
